mapper.select: with ranked as ( select v.conversation_id as id, v.display_name as title, v.partner_id as invited_id, v.partner_name as invited_name, v.partner_handle as invited_handle, sub_msg.content as last_message, sub_msg.created_datetime as last_message_time, coalesce(unread_msg.cnt, 0) as unread_count, coalesce(v.is_muted, false) as muted, v.created_datetime, v.updated_datetime, row_number() over ( partition by least(v.member_id, v.partner_id), greatest(v.member_id, v.partner_id) order by coalesce(sub_msg.created_datetime, v.created_datetime) desc, v.conversation_id desc ) as rn from v_my_chat v left join lateral ( select content, created_datetime from tbl_message where conversation_id = v.conversation_id and is_deleted = false order by created_datetime desc limit 1 ) sub_msg on true left join lateral ( select count(*) as cnt from tbl_message where conversation_id = v.conversation_id and is_deleted = false and sender_id != #{memberId} and id > coalesce(v.my_last_read, 0) ) unread_msg on true where v.member_id = #{memberId} and coalesce(v.is_deleted, false) = false and not exists ( select 1 from tbl_block where (blocker_id = #{memberId} and blocked_id = v.partner_id) or (blocker_id = v.partner_id and blocked_id = #{memberId}) ) ) select id, title, invited_id, invited_name, invited_handle, last_message, last_message_time, unread_count, muted, created_datetime, updated_datetime from ranked where rn = 1 order by coalesce(last_message_time, created_datetime) desc, id desc

select c.id, c.title, rel.sender_id, rel.invited_id, c.created_datetime from tbl_conversation c join tbl_conversation_member_rel rel on c.id = rel.conversation_id where (rel.sender_id = #{senderId} and rel.invited_id = #{invitedId}) or (rel.sender_id = #{invitedId} and rel.invited_id = #{senderId}) order by c.created_datetime desc, c.id desc limit 1
mapper.insert:
select currval('tbl_conversation_id_seq')
insert into tbl_conversation (title) values (#{title})
insert into tbl_conversation_member_rel (conversation_id, sender_id, invited_id) values (#{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{invitedId})
insert into tbl_conversation_setting (conversation_id, member_id) values (#{conversationId}, #{memberId}) on conflict (conversation_id, member_id) do nothing
mapper.update: update tbl_conversation_setting set is_deleted = false, updated_datetime = now() where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and member_id = #{memberId} and is_deleted = true
mapper.select: select member_id from tbl_conversation_setting where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and is_deleted = true
mapper.update: update tbl_conversation_setting set is_deleted = false, updated_datetime = now() where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and is_deleted = true
mapper.select: select v.partner_id as invited_id, v.partner_name as invited_name, v.partner_handle as invited_handle, v.alias, v.conversation_id as id, v.display_name as title from v_my_chat v where v.conversation_id = #{conversationId} and v.member_id = #{memberId} limit 1
select max(id) from tbl_message where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: insert into tbl_conversation_setting ( conversation_id, member_id, last_read_message_id, created_datetime, updated_datetime ) values (#{conversationId}, #{memberId}, #{lastReadMessageId}, now(), now()) on conflict (conversation_id, member_id) do update set last_read_message_id = greatest( coalesce(tbl_conversation_setting.last_read_message_id, 0), excluded.last_read_message_id ), updated_datetime = now()
